overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a dim concrete underpass, ascending a teal-railed staircase, and exploring a futuristic city street with towering neon-lit skyscrapers and palm-lined sidewalks before entering an open pedestrian plaza.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dimly lit concrete underpass toward a distant illuminated billboard

notable_agents.action: seated on concrete steps against the wall

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with thick support pillars creating a cavernous space
illuminated advertisement sign with 'NCOLA' text visible in the distance
wide concrete staircase with teal-painted sides leading upward to street level
scattered trash and litter across the concrete plaza floor

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit concrete plaza beneath a massive highway overpass. The player walks forward through the sheltered space toward a distant illuminated billboard, passing a seated NPC on the right. The environment features scattered debris and the imposing concrete architecture of the overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep concrete stairwell with teal railings connecting underpass to street

events.description: approaching and beginning to ascend the staircase leading out of the underpass
emerging from shadow into bright natural sunlight at the top of the stairs

agents.ego_description: climbing the steep concrete stairs with bright teal railings toward the street level above

entered.detail: bright teal painted concrete railings lining both sides of the staircase
concrete wall covered with white graffiti tags and street art

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a steep concrete staircase with distinctive teal railings, transitioning from the dark underpass to the bright street level above. Graffiti covers the left wall as the camera climbs, with the concrete overpass structure and distant billboard falling behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated city sidewalk alongside multi-lane road with futuristic architecture

events.description: exiting stairwell onto bright sunlit sidewalk at street level
passing underneath large overhead road sign gantry structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past palm trees and futuristic buildings while vehicles pass on the adjacent road

notable_agents.action: futuristic yellow taxi driving along the road parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: large metal gantry structure spanning across the road with traffic signage
towering glass and steel skyscraper with illuminated windows rising into the blue sky
tall palm trees lining the opposite side of the street
large illuminated advertising screens on building facades across the street
dark modern building wall with red neon accent lighting running vertically

segments.scene_description: Emerging into bright sunlight, the player walks along an elevated city sidewalk with a futuristic skyscraper dominating the left side and palm trees lining the busy road to the right. The camera passes under a large overhead road sign while futuristic vehicles drive past, and pedestrians walk in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with benches and holographic advertising kiosks

events.description: turning right into open plaza area from the main sidewalk
camera tilts upward to look at the towering skyscrapers above

agents.ego_description: entering the pedestrian plaza and looking up at the towering architecture while approaching a bench

notable_agents.action: person in white shirt standing near a blue illuminated bench

entered.detail: futuristic hexagonal kiosks with glowing pink and orange neon lights
modern blue benches with integrated neon lighting underneath
floating holographic advertisements and signs above the plaza

segments.scene_description: The player turns into a wide open pedestrian plaza featuring futuristic neon-lit benches and holographic advertising displays. The camera tilts upward to admire the towering glass skyscrapers against the bright blue sky while approaching a pedestrian standing near an illuminated bench. The road and palm trees fall away as the scene opens into this commercial plaza space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, oppressive concrete underpass into the bright, expansive openness of a futuristic city plaza. It begins in a sheltered plaza beneath a massive highway overpass, moving past scattered debris and a seated figure toward a distant illuminated billboard. As the camera ascends a steep concrete staircase with teal railings and graffiti-covered walls, the dark architecture of the underpass falls away to reveal the brilliant sunlight of the street level above. The scene then opens onto an elevated sidewalk where the camera passes under a large road sign, flanked by a dominating skyscraper on the left and palm trees lining a road filled with futuristic vehicles. Finally, the view shifts away from the traffic and turns into a wide pedestrian plaza, tilting upward toward towering glass skyscrapers and holographic displays against a clear blue sky.
